title: thelypteris rivularioides
intro: Thelypteris rivularioides, also known as the river fern or mountain fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris rivularioides include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as a digestive aid and to treat wounds. In herbal preparations, Thelypteris rivularioides is often used in teas, infusions, and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
